DEADCELLS-AMPLIFY_KEYWORD.title: Amplify
DEADCELLS-AMPLIFY_KEYWORD.description: If you have enough Energy, this card is played by spending additional cost and gains a stronger effect.
DEADCELLS-AMPLIFY_KEYWORD.smartDescripti: If you have enough Energy, this card is played by spending additional cost and gains a stronger effect.
DEADCELLS-ATTACK_DEFEND_POWER.title: Attack and Defend
DEADCELLS-ATTACK_DEFEND_POWER.descriptio: Whenever you alternate between playing a [gold]Skill[/gold] and a [gold]Attack[/gold], add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Throwing Knife[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
DEADCELLS-ATTACK_DEFEND_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever you alternate between playing a [gold]Skill[/gold] and a [gold]Attack[/gold], add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Throwing Knife[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
DEADCELLS-BLEEDING_POWER.title: Bleeding
DEADCELLS-BLEEDING_POWER.description: Whenever you play a card, this creature takes [blue]1[/blue] damage, then halve [gold]Bleeding[/gold].
DEADCELLS-BLEEDING_POWER.smartDescriptio: Whenever you play a card, this creature takes [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage, then halve [gold]Bleeding[/gold].
DEADCELLS-BLEEDING_SPREAD_POWER.title: Bleeding Spread
DEADCELLS-BLEEDING_SPREAD_POWER.descript:
[gold]Bleeding[/gold] spreads to ALL enemies.
Whenever you apply [gold]Bleeding[/gold], apply [blue]1[/blue] additional stack.
DEADCELLS-BLEEDING_SPREAD_POWER.smartDes:
[gold]Bleeding[/gold] spreads to ALL enemies.
Whenever you apply [gold]Bleeding[/gold], apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional stacks.
DEADCELLS-BLOODTHIRSTY_SHIELD_POWER.desc: Whenever you are attacked, apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Bleeding[/gold] to ALL enemies.
DEADCELLS-BLOODTHIRSTY_SHIELD_POWER.smar: Whenever you are attacked, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Bleeding[/gold] to ALL enemies.
DEADCELLS-BURNS_POWER.title: Burning
DEADCELLS-BURNS_POWER.description:
Burning creatures take [blue]25%[/blue] more damage from Attacks and [blue]1[/blue] additional damage.
At the start of its turn, it takes [blue]1[/blue] damage, then [gold]Burning[/gold] is removed.
DEADCELLS-BURNS_POWER.smartDescription:
Burning creatures take [blue]25%[/blue] more damage from Attacks and [blue]{Amount}/3[/blue] additional damage.
At the start of its turn, it takes [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage, then [gold]Burning[/gold] is removed.
DEADCELLS-COCOON_POWER.title: Cocoon
DEADCELLS-COCOON_POWER.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] from a card, gain [blue]1[/blue] additional [gold]Block[/gold].
DEADCELLS-COCOON_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] from a card, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional [gold]Block[/gold].
DEADCELLS-CORROSIVE_CLOUD_POWER.title: Corrosive Cloud
DEADCELLS-CORROSIVE_CLOUD_POWER.descript: Whenever you apply [blue]3[/blue] or more [gold]Bleeding[/gold] to an enemy, for every [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Bleeding[/gold], apply [blue]1[/blue] additional [gold]Poison[/gold] to it.
DEADCELLS-CORROSIVE_CLOUD_POWER.smartDes: Whenever you apply [blue]3[/blue] or more [gold]Bleeding[/gold] to an enemy, for every [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Bleeding[/gold], apply [blue]1[/blue] additional [gold]Poison[/gold] to it.
DEADCELLS-DEPRAVED_POWER.title: Depraved Form
DEADCELLS-DEPRAVED_POWER.description: Whenever you deal damage to an enemy, deal [blue]25%[/blue] of that damage to it [blue]1[/blue] more time.
DEADCELLS-DEPRAVED_POWER.smartDescriptio: Whenever you deal damage to an enemy, deal [blue]{ExtraDamage}%[/blue] of that damage to it [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more {Amount:plural:time|times}.
DEADCELLS-FROSTBITE_POWER.title: Frostbite
DEADCELLS-FROSTBITE_POWER.description:
Frostbitten creatures deal [blue]10%[/blue] less damage with Attacks and [blue]1[/blue] less damage.
At the start of its turn, remove [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Frostbite[/gold].
DEADCELLS-FROSTBITE_POWER.smartDescripti:
Frostbitten creatures deal [blue]10%[/blue] less damage with Attacks and [blue]{Amount}[/blue] less damage.
At the start of its turn, remove [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Frostbite[/gold].
DEADCELLS-GRENADE_POWER.title: Grenade
DEADCELLS-GRENADE_POWER.description:
[gold]Grenades[/gold] without [gold]Exhaust[/gold] are automatically played when discarded.
After being played, they go on cooldown, then return from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] to your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] when the cooldown ends.
DEADCELLS-GRENADE_COOLDOWN_LINE: [gold]{card_name}[/gold]: Returns to your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] in [blue]{remaining}[/blue] turns.
DEADCELLS-ICE_SHIELD_POWER.title: Bone-Chilling
DEADCELLS-ICE_SHIELD_POWER.description: This turn, whenever you are attacked, ALL enemies lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
DEADCELLS-ICE_SHIELD_POWER.smartDescript: This turn, whenever you are attacked, ALL enemies lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
DEADCELLS-ICE_SHIELD_LOSE_STR_POWER.desc: Lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] until the end of its next turn.
DEADCELLS-ICE_SHIELD_LOSE_STR_POWER.smar: Lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] until the end of its next turn.
DEADCELLS-IN_TIME_POWER.title: Quick Reaction
DEADCELLS-IN_TIME_POWER.description: Before the start of your turn, if any enemy intends to attack, play [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Shield[/gold] from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
DEADCELLS-IN_TIME_POWER.smartDescription: Before the start of your turn, if any enemy intends to attack, play [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random [gold]Shield[/gold] from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
DEADCELLS-IRON_STAFF_POWER.title: Iron Staff Counter
DEADCELLS-IRON_STAFF_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, deal damage equal to your current [gold]Block[/gold] to ALL enemies [blue]1[/blue] time.
DEADCELLS-IRON_STAFF_POWER.smartDescript: At the start of your turn, deal damage equal to your current [gold]Block[/gold] to ALL enemies [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times.
DEADCELLS-LACERATING_AURA_POWER.title: Lacerating Aura
DEADCELLS-LACERATING_AURA_POWER.descript: Whenever you deal unblocked damage to an enemy, apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Bleeding[/gold].
DEADCELLS-LACERATING_AURA_POWER.smartDes: Whenever you deal unblocked damage to an enemy, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Bleeding[/gold].
DEADCELLS-MAGNETIC_POWER.title: Magnetic Field
DEADCELLS-MAGNETIC_POWER.description: This turn, whenever this creature is attacked, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
DEADCELLS-MAGNETIC_POWER.smartDescriptio: This turn, whenever this creature is attacked, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
DEADCELLS-NEXT_TURN_LOSE_FLIGHT_POWER.de: At the start of your next turn, lose [gold]Soar[/gold].
DEADCELLS-NEXT_TURN_LOSE_FLIGHT_POWER.sm: {Amount:choose(1):At the start of your next turn, lose [gold]Soar[/gold].|Lose [gold]Soar[/gold] in [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turns.}
DEADCELLS-NIGHT_LIGHT_POWER.title: Night Light
DEADCELLS-NIGHT_LIGHT_POWER.description: At the end of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] additional card reward.
DEADCELLS-NIGHT_LIGHT_POWER.smartDescrip: At the end of combat, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional card {Amount:plural:reward|rewards}.
DEADCELLS-NOCTURNE_ATTACKED_POWER.title: Nocturne Mark
DEADCELLS-NOCTURNE_ATTACKED_POWER.descri: The next [blue]1[/blue] times this creature is attacked, it takes [blue]2[/blue] times the damage.
DEADCELLS-NOCTURNE_ATTACKED_POWER.smartD: The next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times this creature is attacked, it takes [blue]{DamageMultiple}[/blue] times the damage.
DEADCELLS-OIL_POWER.title: Oil
DEADCELLS-OIL_POWER.description: [gold]Burning[/gold] applied to this creature is doubled.
DEADCELLS-OIL_POWER.smartDescription: For [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turns, [gold]Burning[/gold] applied to this creature is doubled.
DEADCELLS-RAMPART_POWER.title: Force Field
DEADCELLS-RAMPART_POWER.description: You cannot take any Attack damage.
DEADCELLS-RAMPART_POWER.smartDescription: You cannot take any Attack damage for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turns.
DEADCELLS-REGULAR_SKILL_POWER.title: Regular Skill
DEADCELLS-REGULAR_SKILL_POWER.descriptio: At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Roll[/gold] with [gold]Retain[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
DEADCELLS-REGULAR_SKILL_POWER.smartDescr: At the start of your turn, add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Roll[/gold] with [gold]Retain[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
DEADCELLS-ROB_POWER.title: Rob
DEADCELLS-ROB_POWER.description: At the end of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] additional [gold]Gold[/gold].
DEADCELLS-ROB_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of combat, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional [gold]Gold[/gold].
DEADCELLS-RUTHLESS_POWER.title: Ruthless
DEADCELLS-RUTHLESS_POWER.description: Whenever you apply [blue]2[/blue] debuffs to an enemy, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
DEADCELLS-RUTHLESS_POWER.smartDescriptio: Whenever you apply [blue]2[/blue] debuffs to an enemy, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards}.
DEADCELLS-S_CB_POWER.title: Sonic
DEADCELLS-S_CB_POWER.description: Automatically play the next [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Attack[/gold] you draw.
DEADCELLS-S_CB_POWER.smartDescription: Automatically play the next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Attack[/gold] you draw.
DEADCELLS-SMOKE_BOMB_POWER.title: Stealth
DEADCELLS-SPEED_POWER.title: Speed
DEADCELLS-SPEED_POWER.description: The next [blue]1[/blue] times you play a card, draw [blue]1[/blue] card and gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. Each time this triggers, reduce [gold]Speed[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
DEADCELLS-SPEED_POWER.smartDescription: The next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times you play a card, draw [blue]1[/blue] card and gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. Each time this triggers, reduce [gold]Speed[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
